properties.displayName: Block creation of PostgreSQL Single server
properties.description: Net new creation of Azure PostgreSQL Single Servers will be blocked.
nonComplianceMessages: PostgreSQL Single server doesn't meet AA SCCF benchmark: Block creation of PostgreSQL Single server. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
